title: polypodium albulum
intro: Polypodium albulum, also known as Polypodium leucotomos var. albulum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Polypodium albulum include its potential to protect the skin from sun damage, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in natural skincare products and supplements. Polypodium albulum can be prepared as a herbal supplement, typically in capsule or tablet form, and is also used in some skincare products to harness its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
